final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing trifold travel brochure for a 4-day 3-night Hangzhou itinerary, with famous landmarks floating above a real Hangzhou map background on card stock.

Style/medium: editorial travel brochure design, 3-panel trifold layout, photorealistic paper texture with subtle shadow depth, clean infographic style with map overlay
Composition: top-down flat lay view, trifold brochure spread open showing all three panels, landmarks as 3D cutout illustrations floating 2-3mm above the card stock with soft drop shadows
Subject: Hangzhou tourism brochure featuring iconic landmarks including 断桥残雪 Broken Bridge, 雷峰塔 Leifeng Pagoda, 灵隐寺 Lingyin Temple, 九溪烟树 Nine Creeks, 龙井村 Longjing Tea Village, each rendered as stylized 3D paper cutouts with distinctive architectural features
Scene/backdrop: authentic Hangzhou city map as the base layer with roads, West Lake, and district boundaries visible, printed on textured cream-colored card stock with slight paper grain
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting from top-left, gentle shadows beneath floating landmarks creating depth, clean and inviting travel-guide aesthetic
Color palette: muted map tones (beige, soft green for parks, light blue for water) with landmark accents in traditional Chinese colors (vermilion for pagodas, jade green for temples, tea green for Longjing)
Materials/textures: matte card stock with visible paper fiber, slightly embossed landmark cutouts, subtle gloss on water areas of the map
Text (verbatim): "第一天：西湖经典游，打卡教科书里的江南 断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺 第二天：禅意杭州，穿越千年宋韵 灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城 第三天：九溪烟树徒步，做一日茶山散人 九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径 第四天：文艺收官，解锁杭州AB面"
Constraints: trifold format must be clearly readable with three distinct panels; map must be geographically accurate to Hangzhou; landmarks must be recognizable silhouettes
Avoid: cluttered layout, illegible small text, generic stock photos, overly saturated colors, 8K stuffer words
